title: selaginella padangensis
intro: Selaginella padangensis, also known as Spikemoss or Resurrection Plant, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella padangensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, and promote cardiovascular well-being. In traditional herbal medicine, Selaginella padangensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in some Asian cultures as a component in herbal remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
